home.offer_interviews_desc: In-depth conversations with stakeholders from across the border region.
home.offer_network_desc: Connect with businesses, consultants, and professionals across DE & DK.
home.offer_events_desc: Cross-border forums, workshops, and networking breakfasts near you.
home.focus_sub: Our work is structured around six pillars that drive cross-border collaboration and growth.

focus.data_desc: Mapping regional opportunities and needs through research and analysis.
focus.network_desc: Establishing cross-border business networks connecting professionals.
focus.visibility_desc: Sharing knowledge and stories through our media channels.
focus.talent_desc: Attracting and retaining regional talent across the border.
focus.development_desc: Facilitating cross-border economic advancement and innovation.

home.video_sub: Insights from business leaders and experts on cross-border cooperation.
home.news_sub: Receive updates on events, opportunities, and news from the DE–DK business region.

about.label: About Us
about.title: About Business DE-DK
about.sub: We are a cross-border business initiative dedicated to strengthening economic ties between northern Germany and southern Denmark.
about.mission_text: Business DE-DK improves cooperation between businesses, institutions and initiatives in the border region between northern Germany and southern Denmark. We are funded by the Interreg Deutschland-Danmark programme through the European Regional Development Fund.
about.vision_text: A thriving, integrated cross-border economy where businesses, talent, and innovation flow freely across the Germany-Denmark border.
about.funding_text: Business DE-DK is funded by the European Regional Development Fund through the Interreg Deutschland-Danmark programme.
